name: Decadent Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 bars sweet baking chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter in a large mixing bowl; gradually add sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, beating after each addition.
3. Dissolve baking soda in buttermilk, stirring well.
4. Alternately add the dissolved baking soda mixture and flour to the creamed mixture, beginning and ending with flour. Mix until combined.
5. Add 1 cup of mini-morsels, melted chocolate, chocolate syrup, and vanilla extract, stirring just until blended. Do not overbeat.
6. Spoon batter into a heavily greased and floured 10-inch Bundt pan.
7. Bake at 300°F for 1 hour and 25 minutes or until the cake springs back when touched.
8. Invert the cake immediately onto a serving plate, and let cool completely.
9. Combine chopped white chocolate and shortening in a double boiler; bring water to a boil. Reduce heat to low; cook until the mixture is melted and smooth. Remove from heat.
10. Drizzle the melted white chocolate mixture over the cooled cake.
11. Melt remaining mini-morsels and shortening in a small saucepan over low heat, let cool, and drizzle over the white chocolate.
12. Garnish with chocolate and white chocolate leaves if desired.
